disables_network_requests_for_the_curren.message: Block Net Requests For Current Domain

can_be_open_on_settings.message: (This can be turned on in the settings)

contentSettings_permissions_illustrate.message: To use this feature, you must grant contentSettings permission to toggle cookies, images, JavaScript, geolocation, and access to the microphone and camera for individual sites. This action will not activate microphones or cameras, ensuring no privacy risks. By enabling the feature below, you allow the plugin to request contentSettings permission. Once authorized, it will manage the activation and deactivation of cookies, images, and JavaScript on each website.

apple_for_require_permissions_title.message: Temporary permissions are required to use this feature.

clear_cache_auto_refresh_page.message: Automatically reload active tab after clearing data

clear_cache_not_open_settings.message: Click to clear cache with current settings and skip opening settings by default next time.

only_global_clear_msg.message: Does not support clearing data for an individual domain.

style_view_bottom_tooltip_text.message: Press "Ctrl + H" to view help, and "Ctrl + C" to copy styles.

style_help_a_z_desc.message: Directly type CSS properties and values into an element using the keyboard.

style_help_tab_enter.message: Confirm the property by pressing TAB or the Enter key.

style_help_backspace.message: Hit backspace to erase the typed-in property or value.

style_help_up_down.message: Use the up and down arrow keys to select an attribute.

style_help_ctrl_c.message: Use "Ctrl + C" to directly copy the element's style.

style_help_delete.message: Use the Delete key to remove the current line entry.

show_style_view_toast.message: You're currently in element selection mode. Press ESC to exit, or hover over an element and press Enter to select elements that can't be clicked.

browserData_permissions_illustrate.message: To use this feature, it is necessary to request temporary "browserData" permissions to clear the browser cache. By selecting the "Enable Feature" button, the extension will request browserData permissions from the browser. Once you grant these permissions, the extension will assist you in clearing the cache data associated with specific websites.

show_web_ruler_toast.message: Click to select an element, then hover over another to see the distance between them!

memory_count_diff_text.message: What's the difference from the browser's memory profiling?

memory_count_diff_msg_1.message: The browser tracks the memory usage of each tab, while the plugin measures the JavaScript heap memory used by the webpages.

memory_count_diff_msg_2.message: The plugin calculates and displays the memory usage of iframes separately.

memory_count_diff_msg_3.message: The browser's memory statistics update quite slowly, whereas the plugin updates at a much higher frequency. It is recommended to enable the Memory Floating Ball display in the settings for real-time monitoring of webpage memory usage.

disable_network_type_introduce.message: By clicking on the checkbox, you can disable network requests of the specified types for the current domain. The number preceding the network type indicates how many requests of this type have already been initiated by the current webpage. To fully disable images or JavaScript, please use the "Disable Images" and "Disable JavaScript" features found in the convenient tools section, as this function does not block images and JavaScript that are embedded within the HTML itself. Moreover, this feature does not prevent the browser from utilizing resources already cached. If disabling is unsuccessful, please open the developer console, navigate to the Network tab, and select 'Disable cache'.

all_copy_enable_toast.message: Web page copy restrictions have been lifted; you can now copy freely from the page!

edit_page_enable_toast.message: You've entered webpage editing mode; use the mouse to select elements for editing, copying, cutting, deleting, and other actions.

view_style_add_css_property_tooltip_text.message: You can directly append CSS properties to an element via keyboard input!

copy_header_error.message: Failed to copy the header. Please refresh the page and try again!

modHeader_rule_error.message: The configuration file contains an invalid declaration rule.
